access.safetyNotice: No name, no email, no trace required. You control what you share and when.
access.secretIntro: This secret is shown once. Store it safely to access your report later.
access.ackSecret: I saved my secret and understand it cannot be recovered.
access.existingIntro: Enter your case ID and secret to continue securely.
access.createFailed: Unable to create case right now. Please try again.

errors.VERIFY_FAILED: We could not verify those credentials.
errors.VERIFY_LOCKED: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again. If you saved your credentials, try again later.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please verify your case credentials again.
errors.CASE_CREATE_FAILED: Unable to create case right now. Please try again.
errors.CASE_SUBMITTED: This report has already been submitted.
errors.CASE_SUBMITTED_READONLY: This report has been submitted and is read-only.
errors.CHAT_TOO_MANY_MESSAGES: Too many messages in this conversation
errors.CHAT_MESSAGE_TOO_LARGE: A message exceeds the maximum allowed size
errors.UPLOAD_UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
errors.UPLOAD_NOT_CONFIGURED: File upload storage is not configured. Attach images directly in chat for now.
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: This file is too large. Maximum size is 10 MB.
errors.UPLOAD_FAILED: Upload failed. Please try again or attach the image directly in chat.
errors.UPLOAD_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: This report already has the maximum number of attachments.
errors.OTP_INVALID: That code does not match. Try again.
errors.OTP_EXPIRED: This code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.OTP_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION: This status change is not allowed.
errors.PARTNER_SESSION_EXPIRED: Partner session expired. Sign in again.

dashboard.title: Case queue
dashboard.subtitle: Review submitted anonymous reports and update case status.

chat.demoBanner: Demo chat only. For anonymous reporting, <link>start a secure conversation</link>.
chat.needsSession: Reporting chat requires a verified case session.
chat.submitReminder: Save your case ID {caseId} to check status later. This conversation is now read-only.
chat.submitSuccessDesc: Case {caseId} has been submitted for review.
chat.welcome:
You are in a private space to describe a workplace concern at your own pace.

Share as much or as little as you want. You do not need to give your name, email, or phone number. You can skip any question.

When you are ready, you can submit your report. To begin, what would you like to share about what happened?
chat.suggestion1: How do I describe a workplace concern clearly?
chat.suggestion2: What happens after I submit a report?
chat.suggestion3: How do I stay anonymous when reporting?
chat.suggestion4: What kind of evidence should I include?
chat.messagePlaceholder: Describe your concern or ask a question...

demo.demoBanner: Demo chat only. For anonymous reporting, <link>start a secure conversation</link>.
demo.welcome:
Welcome to the Safe Voices demo assistant.

Ask how anonymous reporting usually works, what to include in a report, or how tracking codes are used. This is general guidance only—not legal advice and not a secure intake session.

What would you like to know?
demo.suggestion2: What should I include in a report?
demo.suggestion4: How do I start a secure report?

crisis.title: Your safety matters
crisis.intro: If you or someone else may be in immediate danger, consider these resources. You can pause this conversation at any time.
crisis.emergencyDetail: If you are in immediate danger, contact local emergency services (for example 911 in the US).
crisis.crisisUsDetail: 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline — call or text 988.

documentation.title: Safe Voices documentation
documentation.subtitle: Enterprise-style whistleblowing and ethics intake: how reporters, investigators, and administrators work together while keeping data scoped and auditable.

metadata.siteDescription: Safe Voices is a secure anonymous reporting platform for organizations that need confidential ethics and compliance intake.
metadata.chatDescription: Ask how reporting works, what to include in a report, or how tracking codes are typically used. General guidance, not legal advice.
